sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER, created_date DATE);
SELECT id, bar(value, 0, 20, 10) AS visual_representation FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_date;
SELECT id, bar(value, 0, (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_data), 10) AS dynamic_visual FROM test_data WHERE value BETWEEN 0 AND (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_data) + 5;
SELECT id, created_date + INTERVAL (bar(value, 0, 20) || ' DAY')::INTEGER DAY AS new_date FROM test_data HAVING new_date IS NOT NULL;

SELECT t1.id, t1.value + (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS adjusted_value FROM test_data t1 JOIN test_data t2 ON t1.value < t2.value WHERE t1.created_date < t2.created_date;
WITH ranked_values AS (SELECT id, value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY created_date) AS rn FROM test_data) SELECT rn, bar(value, 0, 20, 10) FROM ranked_values WHERE rn < 5;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_test AS SELECT id, bar(NVL(value, 0), 0, 20, 10) AS visual_representation FROM test_data WHERE created_date + INTERVAL value DAY > CURRENT_DATE;
